name: huggingface
description: Work the Hugging Face Hub from UR: search and vet models and datasets, read model cards, and download weights — through the official Hugging Face MCP server or the hf CLI.

HF_TOKEN.title: Hugging Face token
HF_TOKEN.description: Access token used by the official Hugging Face MCP server. A read token is enough for search and gated downloads; use a write token only if you intend to push. The hf CLI uses its own hf auth login session or the HF_TOKEN environment variable.

HF_DOWNLOAD_DIR.title: Default download directory
HF_DOWNLOAD_DIR.description: Where /hf-download places files when no target is given. Defaults to a folder named after the repo in the current directory.
